title: 1 · Moon Driving Basics
blurb: Take control of a rover — throttle, steer, brake, camera — and climb a gentle ramp to feel wheel slip on a grade.

title: 2 · Reading the Terrain
blurb: Read the ground for its three hazards — slope, sun-shadow, radio-shadow — before you commit a wheel.

title: 3 · Slopes & Tip-Over
blurb: Climb a borderline grade and feel exactly why a top-heavy rover rolls — plus how to right one that has.

title: 4 · Rover Variants
blurb: Drive the three rovers back to back — Explorer LT, Standard, Hauler — and feel how centre of mass and power change everything.

title: 5 · Join a Team Session
blurb: Connect to a server, find and possess your rover, and read your telemetry — everything you need to drive with a team.
